name: Peanut Butter Chiffon Pie:
recipeIngredient: 9 inch pie shell, baked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the prebaked pie shell and allow it to cool completely.
2. Mix the gelatin with 1/4 cup of cold water. Set aside.
3. Beat the egg yolks in a bowl.
4. In the top of a double boiler set over simmering water, combine the egg yolks, 1/8 cup of sugar, and 1/4 cup of water. Mix well.
5. Stir in the gelatin mixture until completely dissolved. Cook, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Combine the peanut butter, remaining water, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Beat until smooth.
7. Add the egg yolk mixture to the peanut butter mixture. Chill until slightly thickened.
8. Beat the egg whites with salt until they form stiff peaks. Gradually beat in the remaining sugar into the egg whites.
9. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the custard. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
10. Chill until set. Serve with sweetened whipped cream.
Variation: Peanut Brittle Chiffon Pie - Follow the above recipe, adding 1/2 cup of crushed peanut brittle to the custard.
